content: hey, i might be dragged into a 5p meeting... would catch the 645 train. i can get annie directly if you want.
That's fine but no big deal if I need to get her. Dress rehearsal goes until 8:30
ah, w. i'll come home first then either way.
Hi, where did you leave your car?
Our eta is 5:02 but we'll need to park...
I didn't get to see you this morning... just wanted to say hi and good morning... i hope you have a good day xoxo
hi, thanks :) i hope you do too. hope it's ok i didn't want to wake you..

also i think the universe swooped in to save me overnight or something. i hadn't opened power point by the time i went to bed. by 10a i was delivering a 20 slide presentation to the customer that went really well from my desk. krzysztof still doesn't know but i'll show him this afternoon.
I found your coffee and of course it was OK that you didn't wake me... I was glad to see you gone, assumed you'd had some sort of change of heart or something...
I'm glad you're going out on a high note... didn't want this to fester over the trip...
right, me neither. feels so accidental, but i'll take it
hey was thinking of going straight to john's from the train for book club... 's'at ok ?
Sure... he already told me you were arriving at 6:40 so I figured haha
Only if you pick up the pizza for John on the way
did he really want me to ?
just saw the solicitation on our fb page... looks like i am picking it up after all probaly
Yeah you can work that out with him I suppose... :)
"look it's the most glorious rainbow ever !"
ahfuck, sorry... i'll take sid, or do you want a pick up ?
I have maybe lost control a little
Hahaha they went to bed shortly after this :)
That would have been something, eh??
Have fun... I dropped Avery off a few minutes ago and Annie went back to bed :)
Interesting...she's not in the hall of fame though?
Dada is about to try kangaroo meat
Kangaroos are supposed to be kinda a-holes anyway lol
It's just me now haha I hope  so! "Oh pinchy"
Good. R+r was cool, we'll go back after
just got back from ice cream
prob gonna go to sleep soon, heading out early, gonna land at this place tomorrow night, already reserved w/keycodes so they don't care when we get there: https://www.gardengroveretreat.com
will prob be around 7p if we stop in detroit for brunch which is sort of the plan
Goodnight my love, safe travels tomorrow xoxo
You finally got to a hotel?
Soon to bed but yeah up...
Do you see us on the whatever  ?
This is the best pic I can get... the light is terrible lol
It just looks like a slight flush... in person it's more dramatic 🤘
we're 900 miles from havre, mt, but that's the direction we're headed...
Haha yea it's better today... I coated my face in aquaphor when I went to bed :)
oh good, glad to hear... actually had a dream about it this morning... dreamt that it happened to sydney too and was examining
we're staying in beaver creek park in montana tomorrow night: https://www.bcpark.org
Oh gosh... and omg so pretty
yeah, looking forward to it... it has coulees, which are like dry falls where we want during the cleary's wedding weekend but not as dramatic
Watch out for rogue beavers if you camp
uh oh, did you read that ? we will...
Ummmmmm nope just cant ever be too careful 🦫
You know, some beavers get aggressive... and here you over a thousand miles from me to chase them off✨️
Have a great drive today... remind Syd (and you) to stretch and drink water and check in later 💕
I'm having coffee outside, it's a perfect summer morning xoxo
she asked for the water last night and i made her drink more so i think she's catching on, at least a little... still had little caesar's for dinner last night (her idea)
we have light rain, cloudy skies, still quite dark
You two and your Little Caesars - so cute
Not a cloud in the sky here
this imaged rimmed by those familiar fences gave me a not uncommon feeling these days -- a heartswell... like a wave of good energy through my heart and stomach and chest
ha, oh my gosh, that dude

Itinerary

Tue July 2 — 900 miles to Havre, MT, so prob stop somewhere a few hundred short of there tonight and stay
Wed July 3 — Beaver Creek Park, MT — https://www.bcpark.org
Thurs July 4 — ideally the same park if we can find a first come first serve site available, otherwise near there somewhere
Fri July 5 and Sat July 6 — Dinosaur Provincial Park, AB — https://www.albertaparks.ca/parks/south/dinosaur-pp/
Sun July 7, Mon July 8, Tue July 9 — Glacier Campground, West Glacier, MT — https://www.glaciercampground.com

The rest of the trip is somewhat unknown, but imagining something like this:

Wed Jul 10 — somewhere near Devil’s Tower, WY
Thu Jul 11 — somewhere near the badlands, SD
Fri Jul 12 — a stretch goal is to catch a Chicago White Sox game then drive to a motel on the interstate in Indiana somewhere
Sat Jul 13 — would love to get to Rob’s house in Buffalo with time to hang out, might not make it til the next day though
Sun Jul 14 — either Rob’s, Greg’s, or home late
Mon Jul 15 — home
Wow thank you for this... quiets my busy anxious mind :)
ah w :) sorry i didn't do it before we left !
No worries, I've got my eyes on you 👀
I just wanted to know where you were for when you fully lose cell service
It looks like a 45 minute drive from rt 90 (livingston) down to Yellowstone hot springs- pics show a pool you can get in but you might need reservations...would be cool to swim in a hot spring
^ i've always loved that photo... was that today in history or something ?
hi, i know it's late... we got here about 1/2 ago... backtracked sort of, but along a different route to a different town called... sidney ! 5 hrs to our campground tomorrow, goodnight, i love you
that's sweet - I actually saw Sidney on the map when I was looking you guys up yesterday. Fun. Hope it wasn't stressful finding a spot to sleep for the night <3

hi -- nah, it was ok... i asked like 4 different times if we should stay in williston nd because it was a substantial town with lots of good motel / hotel options for like 50 bucks a night but sid talked me out of it and we went for it... i told her if i had to do it again then i'd have overruled her and she stood firm and said we did the right thing because otherwise we wouldn't have seen the pretty drive with all the hills and cows and i realized it all worked out just fine, plus it's a road trip, gotta roll with whatevers here and there
That's incredibly sweet - she was texting me pretty late, saying "you should see all of the cows"

apparently williston doubled in size (i hadn't heard of it) in the last 10 years due to the oil boom in n dakota... saw lots of those derrecks pumping it out of the ground, and a lot of them looked new, not like the old ones that you can't tell if someone just accidentally left it on 80 years ago
Haha well I'm very glad it all worked out - I was getting ready for bed and she was like "nah we're good, it's still sunny here"

awesome, nice to hear. it was kinda invigorating crossing into montana and having the sun restore color in a great sweep across what looked like something out of a dinosaur movie then to notice the clocks had just given us back and hour
i'm'a go grab some coffee and try to get us out of here while maximizing sid's sleep time... 5h to our destination
Sure, have a great day xoxo
how's the morning there ? are you outside w/your coffee ?
saw the zoo pic and heard from sid you did the eagle
But yeah overall fun... I'm inside at the moment - want to grocery shop for tomorrow early before crowds and then leisurely prep some food things...
How did you get your scar on your bottom? It was sledding & stick related, no? Swapping stories in Plympton haha
I was like what the heck is she talking about but yeah...
The scar was falling out of the tree behind the Pembroke house... a small broken tree below extended my crack
Also got a permanent bruise while Greg and I were fighting in our upstairs  bedroom and I fell off a bed  onto a wooden bookend
I haven't spoken to anyone, just read the stories online
The injuries were both prob around 87
I'm home now... may not feel as important in the morning lol - hope you had a good night 💕

Hi -- <3 -- just a quick wifi stop at the visitor centre to check our Dino tour start time and say I love you and also I guess that the profundity of this trip is starting to clarify... we're doing really well, hope you are too
Hi ❤️❤️ that's great, all is well here! Not quite as profound but having lots of quality time so we're great 💕 I hope the Dino tour is amazing, can't wait to hear about it - enjoy!! Love you
Is this antibiotic for Syd's foot?
Opted to sleep in today and enter the park at 3 for some hiking. Gotten up early too many days in a row, so this works
Good! Syd said you'd been having a hard time sleeping because of a crappy small mattress mat? You should invest in a good one :)
Have fun chilling and in the park later xo
Eh the new pad is fine, up at 630 this morning but slept through, been going to bed around 1030 aka sunset
Had been getting up early mostly to jump the day... in whitefish Mt now for lunch, tanking up before we hike
How's ma ? Hot ? Have any tolsandearys returned?
MA is gross hot - I mean I know it's hotter down south or whatever but it's a solid 90 and really really humid
i was out rearranging furniture a little bit, just antsy, have to slip back inside for the a/c every few minutes dripping.
Damn.. just from the new side or did you pull the window unit up ? Sorry I didn't do it before Leaving should have thought
oh no i meant moving furniture around outside...
the inside is fine - annie's sleeping with me we're not spending much time in the "hot" rooms
Just some Annie and me selfies
Ha. Sid had to work for it... wasn't so sure at times
Yeah... it was 2.5 mi w a 400 ft difference at the top (the lake was up the mountain)
Annie wants to type, I'm handing the phone to her
You too ... 1/5 of the way back to you...  :)
Actually thinking it'll be first thing Friday morning and that we'll stay in hot springs  tomorrow night
I mean no rushing home but 💋❤️
Hit the pool at 6a or so
You are on a serious early rising streak
Indeed... down early too... we'll see if it holds
We're swapping schedules, I've been going the other way
Hey I'm getting water from the car here is sid
Timezones will help adjust you back... kinda
We got ice cream but I got bubblegum, it was not good 😞
It should atleast have bits of bubblegum in it
There's bubblegum ice cream at farfars in Duxbury that's famous
Is that the place with the tree?
Bits of bubblegum and so good - we can go when you get home
Here Annie wants to say hi
Are you going to bed soon?
I almost passed out walking there lol
Keep up the hiking when you get home
Maybe we can work some hikes into our nh trip
We saw the world's most preserved dinosaur while in canada
And the world's longest dinosaur, in america
Do you want to be a paleontologist again?
The world's longest dinosaur and largest dinosaur model in the world was about 134 feet long
It's so crazy those dudes were really real
I got a blister on my other toe
We need to toughen you up lol
I can't catch a break lol
Either that or get you better shoes
My face looks so red in the photos from earlier
You look like a non-pasty human
We saw a big forest fire
Pink cheeks make your eyes look more blue
We could see fire sometimes lol
Not really lol, it was pretty far away from us
Hope it didn't spread too far, must be hard when it's so hot
Imagine being a firefighter when it's 94 out?
Me again  :) all showtowned. Goodnight my lovely
Done for tonight. Pierre SD. Night night
Oh no! Video? Pics of the place sonI can finally have a mental image?
Shoot -- I had left the camera in a lock box and didn't go back to retrieve it,  In part because it was sort of crowded with teenagers and might have seemed weird to be snapping photos
Alas... did any teenagers make it across?
I guess you need to bring me back someday... project actually use a pull-up bar...
Yeah a lot were failing but some were holding two rings at a time holding upside down vertically while swinging perpendicularly to the rafters
Yeah, there's def a week worth of things to do in the region if we ever wanted to, including the sd badlands which we skipped essentially and I have never seen

That's a good description but I'm having a hard time making a mental image... this sort if feels like No Tresspassing beach where there are a lot of locals well-versed in the currents and techniques and there's the one out of towner who has no business attempting the crossing lol
But I guess that's not particularly generous to you lol
I love that you're the guy who drove so far for the attempt. Noble. Also cute.
W. Feel like I can check half the bucket item. Now I have  half an item to train into really good shape regardless of whether I end up going back
I miss you too. So much.
I miss you in a lovely way, not a desperate way... I feel like Annie and I are bonding, even if it's just hanging around
I admit the hullabaloo around stupid Ben Folds and finding people to take tickets makes me want to banish everyone from my island
No it's all really ok just finding myself doing just fine
Are you going to have to sit next to strangers or eat the tickets?
How far are you planning to get today?
Prob to Madison or eastern Iowa?
I think we'll probably find people? Bill & Christine are a maybe and Emily is coming
Might try to do one last thing the day after.. a baseball game in Chicago
Also rob won't be available til 230 on the 14th and I'm debating whether to slow down a little for the rendezvous or let this one go
It's OK if you stay there then roll in late on Monday
W... that's what we'll do... Chicago  / white Sox game to slow it down, stay at rob's, home around dinner on sids bday
Perfect... maybe I'll have lobsters waiting :)
We can coordinate on timing that day...
Hi. Davenport Iowa tonight. 180 miles or so to Chicago.
Gotta do some mapping to figure out next... oh, and if they ask, you did know I might take the kid across the border without you
Ok:) might I actually get a phone call?
And ps didn't you already take the kid across haha
Nah, more of a joke, but they did ask that the first time.
Not like they were gonna check
If you had nefarious intent, didn't they know you'd just lie? Weird.
Also I didn't realize you were going over the border again... is that for sure or just maybe?
Will you see the Canada side of Niagara?
Do the mist of the whatever boat ride..
If we have time perhaps... worth it I take it ?
I mean, I've never done it but it sounds cool... might be a fun last hurrah
Right w didn't know if Alicia said
Which side does it go from?
They parked on the us side and just walked across
I thought that extra box was a mini solo stove... cool :)
Yeah thinking we'll stay in Windsor tomorrow night and do Niagara early aft on sun
Haha yes! Jt was perfect for smores without a big fire :)
Hope you are having fun at the show :) we are in Ann arbor for the night, have fun, nite nite
Good morning! Yea it was great - hiwbwas the baseball game etc? Hope you have fun today... Niagara, yes?

Hi -- yeah we went to Niagara on the Canadian side... the view is indeed much better but the atmosphere is an old neighborhood that morphed into an amusement park... kinda weird and hectic w/go karts mini golf small coasters elaborate restaurants and a lot of Indian food. Been at robs for a couple hours... great catching up, he's off to bed, sid and I are in the basement with Netflix:) feels almost like home but just wait til tomorrow  ! ;) looking forward to it 😘
Do you have a timeline? Annie wants to make Syd a cake and maybe I'll get us seafood?
Sounds great. We're going to try for between 5 and 6
OK ❤️ maybe keep me posted if that changes? I'll keep my eye on you 👀
Ha that's right. But I will.
Give Rob & Sue my love... see you so sooooon xoxoxo
She said lol, or that what she did at least
Give her a final 13 year old hug from me, when I get to hug her she'll already be older
You missed a call from Laura.
You missed a video call with Laura.
Do you want anything from sunshine?
omg. i. need. to. live. there.
an ogunquit stop on the way to sunapee adds 1:10:
I'm gonna get you one for nh I think 👀🫦🫣
did you happen to see this, particularly the first video ?: https://www.boston.com/news/local-news/2024/07/29/dragonflies-swarm-ri-beach-sending-beachgoers-scrambling/?p1=hp_secondary
Hahaha I saw this photo but didn't click through for the video
Did u get any good ones ?
yeah, saw that one this morning as well... loveswell
nah. morning meetings, less unpleasant after that, better than the last few days
casually chatting w/cheng about the new world order, it's not so bad it seems
yeah, s'pose. ran too. nice out.
Yeah very nice out 🥰 syd had drums, we talked a little about food exercise etc sounds like she's ready to make some changes... we'll see but it was good chat...
She's doing her summer reading now haha
promising :) thanks for inspiring her, in whatever form it was
We're sort of waiting it out in target... crazy
Hiya! We're here, walked around a bunch - found Marae and her sister and her cousin ... now refueling, Syd found lobster linguine lol
syd looks so cute in that summer shack photo :) the con looks right up her alley too...
I'm hanging in the sorta lobby area and they're doing a spin without me... they both got some art...I told them I wanted to start on our way out by about 4
Keanu Reeves was here Friday and Ralph Macchio yeaterday
Lots and lots of fun cosplay
not that we were actually planning to go here next summer or ever, but if we did, there's def more than a week's worth of stuff to do ! ;)
All good - had 2 hour work meeting and now syds at drums
Lol no not really - first big worship planning session with Tony and emily
Yeahhh we didn't spend a super ton of time on it - just that it'll factor into the first service and how to tie it in with the election and general stress level this fall

fine. keep running well, even better today, despite gaining weight and drinking a lot. maybe it's the weather ? and the protein / carbs ? working on ai, kinda fun, or at least interesting as far as work goes
thom yorke and the other radiohead guy
oh yeah, ha, forgot, i threw on my "new bedford" mix, from around the era of sid's luxurious stay
I just put it on so we can listen together-ish
"despite these slings, de spite the a ha rows"
lol 75% sure that's sarcastic ? want to hedge 25% in case you mean it
Lol I don't even know anymore🤪
No I'm having a blast, walking around without kids is awesome
It's all so quaint and adorable
Quilts and zucchini and goats and art and flower arrangements
And food and cute terrible music lol I love it
OK I'm getting tired lol kids still riding rides and then they want to check out the demolition derby... should have brought earplugs
Everything here in the ride zone is very loud...
It's all teens and drunkards now lol
Your messenger pic still is the beach one but if I click through to your main profile I see the new one...
weird, wonder what the deal there is...
hm, strange... wonder if i should do something or if it's just a glitch or if who cares
Want to come watch kamala with me?
like, our reg tv ? use the non cable remote... the netflix / prime remote
don't worry, i'll make it up during the year, but this is for fantasy football: Everyone send me $150! I only got Johnson and Dodge so far. @thomas-spoth Venmo
Easy - the bus was early, it pulled in ahead of us when we got there like 7:10
I saw syd sit down and start talking to someone... girl wearing a bandana
ha, sweet... was she nervioso or cool or ?
She threatened to disown me if I attempted to take her photo getting onto the bus lol but otherwise fine
were there kids already on the bus or any at the stop too ?
Probably 5 or 6 parent cars in the lot
Hi!! Good except she fell off the bus when it arrived at school 😵‍💫 nurse, ice, embarrassment... good after that lol
omg poor sid ! :( glad to hear everyone was nice though
(don't even tell her i said this, in fact forget it right after i do, but could you imagine getting the call at 7 something ?!)
Lordy my phone rang and I didn't answer it 😐
Good... nothing particularly notable... she came out smiling
awesome. also makes me think i need to look at pictures more. we've taken 10000 but rarely ever reap these rewards !
i could dig around and find 10000 more but omg
hey whenever you get a chance can you please venmo @thomas-spoth 150 ? thanks
did you do all the math on ^ ? both the actual, like, financial math and the emotional math ?
youre in charge of all the maths ;)
ha, wha ?! maybe if we had to build a particle accelerator in the basement.... is there room for that btw ?
um not really, i know we owe like 120k on our existing house so say the old and new are about the same $ we finance 200k over a new 15 yr mortgage at 6% is like 1700/month
not really on the maths, maybe on the accelerator
haha only a teensy tiny bit
but really the fact that a brand new 15 year mortgage would push our "free and clear" date out by like 10 years unless we were prepared to pay it off completely sooner makes it feel untenable
right now we're on track to be mortgage free in July of 2030

but i do really freaking love the house. i don't know about the emotional piece. i assume the basement is unfinished, also there aren't pics of inside the barn so i assume it would need a lot of work before it could hold animals
the yard is pretty insanely perfect
and the house looks like the old/new vibe that you like... it kind of reminds me of a nicer maynard house...
hey, i know we talked about some of the details last time we met w/sarah, but did she put in to move from cash to funds my silverrail 401 ira ?
she emailed me a couple things i need to review, new account for andy and the calculator for expenses/risk... i think she was going to have a recommendation for fund(s) the next time we met
bishop briggs is coming up a lot on spotify for me today and i dont hate it

i was just going to say something about spotify -- i made something that you can choose to use, or not, up to you... ron burgundy will read anything you put on that teleprompter, and when i say anything, i mean eh neh thing eh: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1De3fJYWXulC25zvIvUpKy?si=e7bc1952cf254eb4
hey -- music unlimited said the card wasn't running... is that 'cause it's expired ? or is our account low ?
in any event, they wanted you to run in and provide the card today when you drop her off for lesson
I just checked and there's over 4k in there so it's not low funds... could be getting close to expiration?
w, thanks for checking... i guess just run in w/her if that's cool ?
Yeah we got the new cards in the mail so I might activate mine and start updating all the things...
All set. Also... Syd has a DATE to the school dance next weekend!!!!!
It's a boat dance ... I assume plymouth harbor cruise 🛳
!!!!!! They is Carter. She is GIDDY
Tell me everything. What is she? Jock? Indie? I bet she's smart. Is she smart?
You think I didn't catch the reference?
on a way less important note, how did the homework thing pan out ?
that one was actually an lol
I told her to figure it out anyway today lol
Do it on paper if you have to
Because Back in my day we had to do all our homework on papahhh
hey, was thinking of heading up to sunapee... how does fri after 4 home sat night sound ? sun i was going to go to balsis'... i could go after church
That all sounds fine I suppose
Carter from Carver wants to take Syd to the movies on Friday
How was the field trip and mall ?
Hi - yeah good- she found a dress and had fun with all the kids - there was some drama with some of the other kids but she wasn't involved and I think it all blew over...
